name: chromemcp-browser
description: Control the shared Windows ChromeMCP browser through the local Playwright MCP endpoint.

interface.shortDescription: Drive a shared signed-in Windows Chrome from Codex
interface.longDescription: ChromeMCP Browser exposes the local ChromeMCP Playwright MCP server to Codex, giving agents a callable browser tool backed by a persistent Windows Chrome profile over CDP.
defaultPrompt: Use ChromeMCP to test my local app
Open this page in the shared Chrome browser
Run a browser smoke test with ChromeMCP
